ops.title: Board doctrine: one artifact per trip; rounds are phases
ops.body: Ruling (getaway cc-present v2 redesign, approved plan 2026-07-18): a trip's entire interactive life runs on ONE cc-present artifact — intake round → "Finalists" → "Head to head" (skipped when the shortlist submit carries exactly one pick) → "Booking sheet" (content-only) → `close --summary`. Phase transitions are submit → `outcomes --no-doc` → apply → `round --title` → full push; within a round only `update-block`/`reply`/`remove-block`. Block ids are phase-namespaced (`in-`/`fin-`/`cmp-`/`book-`) because id reuse across rounds inherits stale verdicts. Corollary: a row the user has seen never disappears — gone/degraded rows get flagged in place, never removed. A second trip in the same window needs `start --new`.
